title: Location-Area Validation, Encounter Relations, Filters, and Provenance · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts Explore Changed Fixtures
summary: The explore command confuses location endpoints, casts nested encounter arrays, filters before validation, collapses duplicate relationships, and produces an unbounded result list. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts explore changed fixtures increment in validated provenance-rich encounter explorer. Learners progress through…
